message:
Wire sharing UI to real API endpoints and add share management page

- Replace mock data in /share/[linkCode] page with real API calls
- Wire ShareDialog to POST /api/share for creating links
- Wire ShareDialog to DELETE /api/share/[code] for revoking links
- Add password verification via POST /api/share/[code]/verify
- Create /settings/shared page for managing user's share links
- Add Sharing section to Settings page with navigation card

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-1hw","title":"Implement jfp copy command with clipboard integration","description":"Part 6.2 of PLAN. 'jfp copy ' copies prompt content to clipboard. Cross-platform: pbcopy (macOS), clip (Windows), wl-copy/xclip (Linux). --fill prompts for missing variables before copy. Shows success message with prompt title. Integrates with template renderer for variable substitution.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:47:37.552140127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T07:30:06.299213624Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T07:30:06.299213624Z","close_reason":"Implemented --fill flag for interactive variables, --json output, cross-platform clipboard with graceful fallback","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-1hw","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6gx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:49:51.272205770Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-1hw","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:49:51.244455332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-1m9a","title":"Enhance copy button feedback with satisfying animation","description":"# Task: Enhance Copy Button Feedback ## Context The copy button currently changes from Copy icon to Check icon when clicked. While functional, it lacks the "satisfying" micro-interaction that Stripe/Linear provide. ## Current Behavior 1. User clicks Copy button 2. Icon changes from Copy → Check (instant) 3. Toast appears 4. After 2s, icon changes back ## Proposed Enhancements ### 1. Icon Transition Animation ```typescript import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; // In PromptCard.tsx copy button ``` ### 2. Button Background Flash ```typescript // Add success background flash const [showFlash, setShowFlash] = useState(false); const handleCopy = async () => { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(content); setCopied(true); setShowFlash(true); setTimeout(() => setShowFlash(false), 300); // ... rest of handler };
